## Project Summary

This is a complete Veterans Advocate Center website built with:
- ⚛️ React 18 + TypeScript
- ⚡ Vite 4 build tool
- 🎨 Material-UI v5 design system
- 🧭 React Router for navigation
- 📱 Responsive design
- ♿ Accessibility features

The website includes all major pages matching the design provided, with professional styling, responsive layout, and proper navigation structure.
